name: Warm Cucumber/Red Onion Relish with Mint
recipeIngredient: 2 cucumbers, halved, seeded, and sliced thin (peeled if thick skinned)
1 medium red onion, halved and sliced thin
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat 2 tablespoons olive oil in a large sauté pan.
2. Add cucumbers; sauté until lightly colored, about 2 minutes.
3. Add onion and season with salt and pepper to taste; sauté until the vegetables just turn translucent, about 2 minutes longer.
4. Turn the cucumber mixture into a medium bowl.
5. Stir in vinegar, mint, and remaining olive oil.
6. Check the seasonings and serve.
